problem: What synthetic material perfectly mimics bone's mechanical and biological properties?
mechanism: Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko)
hypothesis: If Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko) is applied to and, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
